governingBody: Virginia corrections agencies and prison mailrooms
reasonSummary: The Virginia prison-ban record treats the book as excluded reading inside state custody, which shows how prison and mailroom censorship function as a government reading regime. The exported reason says: A1 A2 A3 A4 B
